app.title: Qwen3.6-27B: Flagship-Level Coding in a 27B Dense Model
app.author: mfiguiere
app.description: QwenAI is a platform for fine-tuning and deploying large language models.
proposed_tests: Install QwenAI CLI and run a sample training job
Fine-tune a pre-trained model using QwenAI
Deploy a trained model to QwenAI cloud
